description: Network discovery scans are picking up out-of-scope devices. An exclusion policy document has been placed on the desktop at ~/Desktop/discovery_exclusion_policy.txt. Read the policy, log into OpManager at http://localhost:8060 (credentials: admin / Admin@123), and navigate to Settings > Discovery > Ignore MAC/IP (or Discovery Filters). Add the two specified IP ranges to the Ignore IP Address list, and add the two specified MAC address OUIs to the Ignore MAC Address list. Save all changes so they persist.
